creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Harry NEWTON from comment #2)
Thanks, if you have `DEVELOPER=yes` in your /etc/make.conf, it will run the additional Q/A tests. It currently shows:

====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
Error: 'bin/teachjove' is referring to /usr/home/freebsd-ports/editors/jove/work/stage
Error: 'bin/jove' is referring to /usr/home/freebsd-ports/editors/jove/work/stage
Error: 'libexec/jove/recover' is referring to /usr/home/freebsd-ports/editors/jove/work/stage
*** Error code 1

I suspect the binary has these paths hard coded.
